name: aleem2z-skills
description: Claude Code skills by aleem2z — WordPress and Elementor workflows.

plugins.name: elementor-json
plugins.description: Convert designs to Elementor-compatible JSON templates for WordPress. Two skills (elementor-json + elementor-verify) plus the /verify-elementor command. 56-widget catalog (free + Pro), container patterns, custom_css recipes, gotchas, and a strict fresh-subagent auditor that catches hallucinated HTML widgets and JSON-settings-as-CSS violations.
